statement.headerDoc:
Problem 011 / STEP 875 — n=911 Universal On-Ramp (Atomic Cores)
  ================================================================

  Empirical finding (STEP 872-873, 2026-04-18):
    All 25 atomic hard cores of E_{1.8} (STEP 696 canonical list) have Collatz
    orbits that visit the value 911 before reaching 1. Verified empirically
    for n ≤ 10^6 (100% atomic-core necessity).

  This file formalizes the finite-n version as a Lean 4 zero-sorry theorem.
  Each individual core is verified with `native_decide`, and the aggregate
  theorem follows.

  Sources:
    - src/axiom-os/collatz-atomic-c

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
